top_signals.title: Investors in Farage-backed Bitcoin venture get burnt after stock slides
top_signals.summary: Brits who bought shares in a crypto venture backed by Nigel Farage have seen their investment tumble by more than a third in the space of just three months. In March, Farage threw his weight behind Stack BTC, an Aquis-listed Bitcoin firm, investing hundreds of thousands of pounds to become one of the company’s largest [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Central bankers sound alarms over agentic AI finance risks
top_signals.summary: “We need to think about new tools and a different way of working with the [AI] market in a more collaborative way,” says Nikhil Rathi, CEO of the UK’s finance watchdog.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
